ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "provenance_url" TEXT /* URL to the source or provenance of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., tabular, image, text) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regularizations" (
  "regularization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of regularization parameters */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the regularizations are associated with */,
  "regularizations" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of regularization parameters */,
  "regularization_type" TEXT /* Type of regularization used (e.g., L1, L2, dropout) */,
  "regularization_strength" REAL /* Strength of the regularization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regularization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regularizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of depth settings */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the depths are associated with */,
  "depths" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of depth settings */,
  "depth_type" TEXT /* Type of depth setting (e.g., tree depth, neural network depth) */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depths_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_labels" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference label entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the reference labels are associated with */,
  "reference_labels_paired_n_est_max_depth" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of reference labels paired with maximum depth estimations */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of label (e.g., binary, multi-class) */,
  "num_labels" INTEGER /* Number of labels in the reference labels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_labels_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimal_depths" (
  "optimal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimal depth entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the optimal depths are associated with */,
  "paired_n_est_max_depth_regularizations_optimal_depths" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of paired estimations and their optimal depths */,
  "optimal_depth_type" TEXT /* Type of optimal depth (e.g., tree depth, neural network depth) */,
  "optimal_depth_value" REAL /* Optimal depth value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimal_depths_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threshold_guesses" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold guess entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the threshold guesses are associated with */,
  "threshold_guess_paired_n_est_max_depth" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of threshold guesses paired with maximum depth estimations */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., classification threshold, regression threshold) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threshold_guesses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cross_validation_folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-validation fold entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the folds are associated with */,
  "folds" INTEGER /* Number of cross-validation folds used */,
  "fold_type" TEXT /* Type of cross-validation fold (e.g., k-fold, stratified k-fold) */,
  "num_folds" INTEGER /* Number of folds used in cross-validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cross_validation_folds_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission is associated with */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
